assets.prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. Asset type: ReelForge demo intro background, 16:9 landscape PNG, 1536x864 or larger. Primary request: Brand-intro reveal in a premium video production control room, glowing review rails opening like a stage, confident agency-grade mood, no readable branding. Scene/backdrop: high-end agency editing suite, cinematic control room with matte dark walls, abstract review rails and polished production surfaces. Subject: luminous rails opening from center like a stage reveal, abstract blank hero area, no brand name or symbols. Style/medium: premium cinematic 3D render, luxury production design, high contrast editorial polish. Composition/framing: wide 16:9 first-frame hero, central opening rails, strong depth, hint of next layer at bottom, generous negative space for later HTML title. Lighting/mood: crisp dramatic spotlight, signal-green rail glow, warm amber review lights, confident launch energy. Color palette: matte charcoal, graphite, black glass, restrained signal green, warm amber, subtle metallic highlights. Constraints: no visible text; no letters; no numbers; no readable UI; no glyphs; no labels; no logos; no watermarks; no branding; no signage; all copy and brand text will be added later as HTML layers. Avoid: typography, alphabetic marks, numerals, fake UI text, title cards, logo shapes, watermark, signage, readable screens, interface labels.

Use case: productivity-visual. Asset type: ReelForge demo quality gate background, 16:9 landscape PNG, 1536x864 or larger. Primary request: Quality review gate before delivery, abstract variance bands aligning into clean blank frames under warm inspection lights. Scene/backdrop: premium agency review bay made of smooth dark panels, simplified surfaces with no controls or labels. Subject: unlabeled translucent bands entering from both sides and converging into one perfectly aligned blank central frame, signal-green alignment rails, amber inspection lights. Style/medium: cinematic high-end 3D technical render, elegant premium QA visual, minimal abstract geometry. Composition/framing: wide 16:9, central clean frame alignment, side bands symmetrical, open space for later HTML overlays. Lighting/mood: warm amber inspection light, signal-green final alignment glow, dark suspense resolving into confidence. Color palette: matte charcoal, graphite, black glass, signal green, amber, subtle steel. Constraints: completely text-free image; no visible text; no letters; no numbers; no glyphs; no labels; no readable UI; no tiny markings; no tick marks; no buttons with labels; no logos; no watermarks; no code; all copy will be added later as HTML layers. Avoid: typography, pseudo-text, alphabetic shapes, numerals, QA words, console micro markings, fake labels, signage, watermark, brand marks, icons containing letters.
